title: Generics, Type Sets, Constraints, Inference, and Iteration · Go Semantics Case: Constraints Type Sets
summary: A collection library needs reusable operations without reflection, lost relationships, over-broad constraints, or unreadable APIs. Planned artifact: Add and verify the go constraints type sets increment in a constrained reusable collection library. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Build minimal constraints from method elements, unions, underlying-type approximations, comparable, and intersection semantics.
Define generic functions and types, follow type inference, and retain relationships among parameters and results.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
